questions.question: Represent the following statement in predicate logic: 'All students in a class are older than 18 years'.
questions.hint: Use predicates, variables, and logical operators

questions.question: Prove that the following statement is a tautology using predicate logic: 'All humans are mortal and all mortals are human'.
questions.hint: Use propositional and predicate logic rules

questions.question: Represent the following statement in predicate logic: 'A person is a doctor if and only if they have a medical degree'.
questions.hint: Use predicates, variables, and logical operators
